howItWorks.intro: This steps to calories calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Individual results vary based on metabolism, genetics, and activity level. Consult your doctor before starting any program.

faq.question: How many calories does 10,000 steps burn?
faq.answer: For a 170 lb person, roughly 485 calories. This varies by weight, walking speed, and terrain.

faq.question: How many steps should I walk per day?
faq.answer: 10,000 steps is a common goal but studies show significant health benefits starting at 7,500 steps. More is better up to about 12,000 steps.

faq.question: How far is 10,000 steps?
faq.answer: About 5 miles for average stride length. This takes roughly 80-100 minutes of walking.

faq.question: Do steps from housework count?
faq.answer: Yes — any movement counts. Cleaning, cooking, and shopping all contribute to your daily step total and calorie burn.
